title: Javed Iqbal: The Untold Story of a Serial Killer
original_title: Kukri: The Untold Story of Serial Killer Javed Iqbal
overview: The story of serial killer Javed Iqbal, who sexually abused and killed more than 100 children in Lahore between 1998 and 1999.
